videos.headline: Jacksonville State's Tyler Huff scores a rushing TD
videos.description: Tyler Huff finds the end zone with a 3-yard rushing touchdown vs. Sam Houston.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jacksonville State's Tyler Huff scores a rushing TD) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tyler Huff grabs another rushing TD for the Gamecocks
videos.description: Tyler Huff scores a 38-yard rushing touchdown to give Jacksonville State a 14-3 lead vs. Sam Houston.
